name: Why is ChatGPT saying the wrong things about my business?
description: Wrong answers usually come from inconsistent or outdated information across your website and listings.

mainEntity.name: Why is ChatGPT saying the wrong things about my business?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest risks are outdated facts, inconsistent business information, and pages that are hard for AI systems to read. If ChatGPT repeats wrong hours, services, or locations, treat that as a cleanup issue across your website and listings.
acceptedAnswer.description: Wrong answers usually come from inconsistent or outdated information across your website and listings.
